reasoning: Polymarket odds were 0.72 as of mid-October 2025 for Google to end the year #1. Recent news as of October 20, 2025, shows Google is actively testing its Gemini 3.0 AI models under codenames "lithiumflow" and "orionmist" on the Chatbot Arena, setting it up for a late Q4 release. Historically, highly anticipated generation jumps (like a 3.0) take the #1 spot. Meanwhile, reports suggest OpenAI's upcoming "Orion" model has faced scaling challenges and it's unclear if it will launch a dominant leap before the end of the year. Anthropic's Claude 4 generation released earlier in 2025 (with 4.5 updates appearing later). The combination of the imminent Gemini 3.0 release on the Arena, potential struggles with OpenAI's Orion, and the strong market baseline (0.72) makes Google highly likely to secure the top spot by December 31. Additionally, the alphabetical tie-breaker works in Google's favor against OpenAI, Meta, xAI, etc. Given the new developments around the pre-release models appearing on Lmarena test tracks, I will lightly adjust the market price upwards to 77%.
